name: Cauliflower Lettuce Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the Miracle Whip Salad Dressing, grated Parmesan Cheese, granulated Sugar, and instant minced Onion.
2. Add the cooked bacon crumbles, chopped cauliflower pieces, and Romaine lettuce to the bowl. Mix lightly.
3. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
